capability: the novelty reserve tracks the recent novelty rate
claim: the same genuine newcomer is less surprising after a burst of newcomers than after a long stable stretch, matched on total mass
stimulus_shape: 3 conditions (high / low recent novelty + large-cast control) x 2 organs (text, music)
mechanism: the reserve amplitude becomes the gamma-decayed recent-newcomer rate (core noveltyAmplitude) carried through the UNCHANGED Born step in surpriseAt; context enters at the amplitude, the law stays put
layer: interior (src/core/surprise.js#noveltyAmplitude) + reader front-end (src/perceiver/reading.js, opt signalNovelty); default path byte-identical
scope_open: predictive channel pNovel (reading.js) still uses the constant — follow-up pressure 002
image/frequency/video organs not yet driven through signalNovelty

gates.parity: 654/654 suite green; surprise.test.js exact-value goldens unchanged
gates.generalization: no confirmed capability regressed; suite is the standing no-regression set
gates.omnimodal: confirmed in 2 organs via the same interior helper
gates.control: Delta(ctrl) approx Delta(low) << Delta(high) and mass identical — cast size and mass ruled out
